title: Packaged Factory Reference
description: Look up the ordered packaged factory definitions shipped with @you-agent-factory/packaged-factories—canonical names, descriptions, published metadata, and unabridged sources on a stable docs route.

indexOverview.title: Packaged factory index
indexOverview.body: This reference lists each packaged factory in docs-owned allowlist order. Each entry exposes its canonical name, packaged description when present, straightforward published and schema metadata, a stable child link, and the complete unabridged definition source.
